description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-sectioned structure and a landscaped yard. The front features a prominent porch with columns, manicured lawns, and a central entryway flanked by windows. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and several trees providing shade. The house has a combination of gable and hip roofs, with dormer windows and decorative trim adding architectural interest. Multiple balconies and outdoor seating areas are visible, suggesting ample space for relaxation and entertaining. The exterior is finished in light colors, with large windows and French doors enhancing natural light and visual appeal.
description: A spacious, two-story suburban house with landscaped yards, a front porch, and a backyard pool. The design features gable roofs, large windows, and multiple outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch with columns, manicured lawn, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard patio, swimming pool, trees, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, patio, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Side view with driveway, garage, and visible car, as well as the lawn and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture and dormer windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, columns, steps, and decorative trim
